For so many years I have been honored to win the “Best Orthodontist” award in Mckinney in either the Reader’s Choice paper or the Living Magazine “Best of” contests. However, I cannot accept this award myself without sharing it with my awesome partner, Dr. Jessica Downs, who is an outstanding orthodontist, and our spectacular staff at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. Our office is known as the fun “Hollywood” office, where we practice Top Mckinney Orthodontics with state of the art treatment.

Our Mission Statement Our mission is to create Hollywood Smiles using state of the art orthodontics in our exciting environment by our caring team who are dedicated to accomplishing the work that we have been called to do. Everyone will be treated like a STAR. We provide dazzling Service while demonstrating great Teamwork. Our doctors and staff will be Accountable for treating our patients, families, colleagues and others with the utmost Respect.

However, if you are traveling down Virginia then you could miss us. Thats because we are located behind the building directly on the corner of Virginia Parkway and Ridge Road. Just enter the parking lot behind this building on the corner and you will see our large sign right in front. We can’t wait to meet you and give you a beautiful Hollywood Smile. Keep An Eye Out For Croc Hollywood And Our Croc Bus. Croc Hollywood is our favorite (and only) mascot at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics.

We have helped to create over 6,000 smiles and have had so much fun doing it. Many words have been used to describe a visit to the orthodontist and fun has never been one of them until now. Capturing the glittering lights of Hollywood, exciting camera and film decor, and action-packed Top Mckinney Orthodontics rooms make Dr. Stephanie Crise and Dr. Jessica Downs office feel more like an exciting family destination than an orthodontist’s office.

Our vibrant atmosphere and friendly, joyful staff are enough to make any kid want to wear braces, and every adult want to be a kid again. Luckily at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics we treat both children and adults. Our office is easy to locate on the North East corner of Ridge and Virginia Parkway. If you are coming down Ridge road then you will surely see our very large logo sign “Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics” on the side of our Top Mckinney Orthodontics building.

Respect we respect the responsibility we have been given, and we’ve been blessed with the opportunity to encourage you to brighten your world one smile at a time. Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics has been in business in Mckinney for 25 years. It has been our honor and privilege to provide gorgeous Hollywood Smiles to everyone that chooses Top Mckinney Orthodontics. For over 25 years, our office has become a pillar of our community, loved by many throughout Collin County and the surrounding areas.

Service we will serve you with a joyful heart, welcoming your comments and questions, ensuring your total well being mind, soul and smile. Trust you can trust our doctors and staff to care for you like family, banding together with elastics and brackets in unity with one another. Accountability our aim is to treat everyone like a Star, keeping your teeth gleaming and your smiles beaming.

If you or your friends want a chance to ride in our Croc Bus with Croc Hollywood then follow us on Instagram and Facebook and watch for all of our contests. Come by our office during our office hours, Monday through Thursday (7:45am 6pm) to check out our Croc bus, our amazing office and to say hello to Croc Hollywood and our fun, loving staff. Thank you to all of our patients for voting us Best Orthodontist in Mckinney, time and time again.

He is a green crocodile that wears a suit and tie and a top hat with many stars on it. He is in many of our ads and can be seen stopping by elementary schools during our dental presentations every year with one of our doctors, Dr. Stephanie Crise. Croc Hollywood has also been seen riding around Mckinney in our Croc Bus. We usually have the Croc Bus located in our parking lot right next to Dowell Middle School and it can be seen easily when driving down Ridge Road.

We have taken our Croc Bus to many different events around town and it has made yearly appearances at the Mckinney Christmas Parade. Winners of some of our Smiles Hollywood Top Mckinney Orthodontics contests have won rides in our Croc Bus to Proms, dances and movie nights. Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics has previously used the Croc Bus to take our winners and their friends to the mall for a fun shopping day.

--- Services We Offer ---
[et_pb_section fb_built=1 fullwidth=on _builder_version=4. 0.

Phase Two usually requires braces on all the teeth for an average of 18-24 months for both teens and adults. We offer the fastest, most high-tech braces on the market, both metal and clear Damon and In-Ovation Braces. These braces move teeth faster, with less friction, meaning fewer appointments and more comfort for our patients. Also, did you know that 25% of our patients are Adults.

5 global_colors_info={}] Teeth Whitening White teeth are a sign of healthy teeth. We have several choices when choosing whitening options at our office. We offer take-home whitening kits with and without trays, as well as in-office whitening systems. Our whitening kits range from quick kits like prescription grade Crest Whitening strips and take-home “Go” whitening trays.

Orthodontics for Adults has become more popular due to the aesthetics of both Clear Braces and Clear Aligner treatment. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=clear-aligners (FOR TEENS ADULTS) module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 27. 0 hover_enabled=0 global_colors_info={} sticky_enabled=0] clear-aligners (FOR TEENS & ADULTS) clear-aligners are a series of invisible, removable, and comfortable clear plastic trays that straighten your teeth without braces.

5 global_colors_info={}] Wisdom Teeth Removal No need to go to another office for tooth removal. We provide removal of wisdom teeth , and other teeth if necessary, as well as minor gum surgeries (like frenectomies or fiberotomies). We offer a FREE Top McKinney Orthodontics evaluation for wisdom teeth removal and other minor dental surgeries. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=Teeth Whitening module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 19.

Good retainer wear ensures that our patients retain their beautiful smiles. When your Hollywood Smile is complete, you’ll receive both an upper and lower retainer, so you will be able to keep your smile spectacular for a lifetime. But because we know that dogs love retainers and life happens, we give every patient one free replacement retainer if the inevitable happens. Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics knows that sometimes patients forget to wear their retainers too.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=PHASE ONE EARLY ORTHODONTIC TREATMENT (AGES 7-12 YEARS) module_id=braces module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 27. 0 global_colors_info={}] PHASE ONE EARLY ORTHODONTIC TREATMENT (AGES 7-11 YEARS) Phase One Early Orthodontic Treatment for ages 7-11 involves appliances for skeletal correction & habit correction. Diagnosing problems early is critical in orthodontics.

Part of our commitment to your smile is monitoring your tooth movement even after treatment is finished. We will see our patients for regular Top McKinney Orthodontics retainer check appointments for about 1½ years after treatment is completed. We want to do everything we can to help you keep that Hollywood Smile perfect for your life. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=Wisdom Teeth Removal module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 19.

We make them here, and they can usually be inserted within a week. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=PHASE TWO FULL BRACES ORTHODONTIC TREATMENT (AGES 12-99 YEARS) module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 27. 0 global_colors_info={}] PHASE TWO FULL BRACES ORTHODONTIC TREATMENT (AGES 12-99 YEARS) Phase Two full braces orthodontic treatment starts when all permanent teeth have erupted (usually by age 12 or 13 years).

Early treatment can help avoid the need for more aggressive treatments like tooth removals or jaw surgery in the future. Some of the Phase One appliances we offer are expanders (pictured), holding arches, space maintainers, face masks for underbites, tongue thrust and thumb-sucking habit appliances, and headgear or Herbst Top McKinney Orthodontics appliances for overbite problems. With an in-house laboratory, you and your child won’t have to wait weeks for your appliances.

They are also removable for eating and cleaning teeth. Why wear braces if you can move your teeth with aligners. These clear and almost completely invisible aligners are easy and comfortable to wear. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=FREE RETAINER REPLACEMENT module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 24. 2 global_colors_info={}] FREE RETAINER REPLACEMENT Retainers are worn to keep teeth straight after Braces or Clear Aligner treatment has been completed.

We also offer custom whitening trays which are made in our lab and are specifically custom fit to the patients own teeth and will last for years. Whether you need just a little Top McKinney Orthodontics whitening or it has been years since your teeth were white, we have an option for you. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=Custom Sports Guards Night Guards module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 19.

Sports guards come in a variety of fun colors to choose from and, depending on the sport, different thicknesses. All are made here in our in-house laboratory. These wires bring about faster tooth movement while still allowing a greater measure of comfort for our patients. Our Top McKinney Orthodontics doctors and staff are always learning about new materials and better innovative ways to best treat our orthodontic patients. Our doctors will evaluate your bite to see if a nightguard is needed to help keep your bite safe. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=In-House Lab module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 19. 5 global_colors_info={}] Tiffany Hill Certified Lab Technologist In-House Lab Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics is proud to have an in-house lab with a certified lab technologist , making it possible for us to have faster turnaround on retainers and other appliances (sometimes even on the same day.

The Itero scanner allows the doctor to see instantly a before & after image and eliminates the need for messy impressions. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 27. 0 global_colors_info={}] HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS At Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, we stay up-to-date on the latest and most effective materials for bringing you the smile you desire.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=DIGITAL X-RAY EQUIPMENT ITERO SCANNER module_class=services-module _builder_version=4. 19. 5 global_colors_info={}] DIGITAL X-RAY EQUIPMENT & ITERO SCANNER We utilize digital x-rays , which deliver minimal radiation and far less than the x-ray equipment of the past. We can view these x-rays on the computer immediately and demonstrate to the patient where changes need to be made.

) No need to wait weeks for appliances to be made and then delivered. Our lab has state-of-the-art equipment and the highest-quality materials. We pride ourselves on fitting our patients with Top McKinney Orthodonticsappliances made from superior products and by a certified lab technologist. Having an in-house laboratory allows the doctors to have complete oversight of the appliances being made and the quality of those appliances.

Our excellent dentist, Dr. David Roberts, with over 30 years of experience comes to our office here in McKinney to remove wisdom teeth (erupted or impacted), as well as other teeth that may need removing (for orthodontic reasons). He also performs surgeries like frenectomies, operculectomies and fiberotomies. Plus, we offer a FREE surgical evaluation for wisdom teeth removal and for any of these other surgeries. Why Remove Wisdom Teeth/ 3rd Molars.

Crise or Dr. Downs, will let you know whether your wisdom teeth need to be removed during or after your orthodontic treatment. You may get a call from one of our treatment coordinators, letting you know it’s time to consider removal of wisdom teeth or you can call us directly and ask about wisdom teeth removals. Our treatment coordinator will check your insurance benefits for you and provide a quote so that you may know your cost for the procedure and what your insurance will cover.

Downs, will examine your mouth and an X-ray called a panoramic X-ray will be taken so that all of your teeth can be seen. The doctor will then discuss the process with you and you will be set up with a surgical date. Be sure to bring any dental and medical insurance information (or card) with you so we can check your insurance benefits for you. The Top McKinney Orthodontics consultation and the X-ray are absolutely FREE. If you are currently a patient in braces or clear-aligners in our office, Dr.

Be sure to bring your medical and dental insurance Top McKinney Orthodontics information, in order for our treatment coordinators to give you an accurate quote. Our treatment coordinator will call you with the financial information once she has checked your insurance and will then help you to set a date on the calendar for the wisdom teeth/ 3rd molar removal procedure. It’s that easy.

Most patients will, therefore, need to get their wisdom teeth removed, somewhere between 14 and 20 years of age. Years ago, most people waited until after the age of 18 years to have their wisdom teeth removed, however, it is now recommended to get them removed at an earlier age because the roots aren’t as long, if taken out at an earlier age. This means the tooth sockets (or holes) will be smaller once the teeth come out and it will take the body less time to fill the socket with bone.

About one week before your scheduled procedure, our treatment coordinator will call you to go over several things; such as the date, time, what to wear, what not to eat or drink etc. before coming in for your scheduled surgery. Typically we would not want you to eat or drink anything except for sips of water 6 hours before your surgery. About Dr. Dave Roberts DDS… Dr. Dave Roberts has been traveling the metroplex since 1987, performing nearly 25,000 surgeries.

He is a general Top McKinney Orthodontics dentist who provides oral surgery. He received his Doctorate of Dental Surgery degree from the University of Illinois Dental School. He then spent two years in San Antonio in dental residency school at the University of Texas Health Science Center. He was awarded “Young Dentist of the Year” in 1990 for Dallas County. Dr. Roberts makes himself very available to the patient and their parents.

He will give you his cell number and email, so you can reach him any time, day or night, with questions and/or concerns. He is available 24/7 to assist each of his patients. We are often asked how the patient is put to sleep for the surgery. Dr. Roberts uses I. V (conscious sedation), also known as twilight sleep. The patient receives this through an I. V. in their arm. With this type of sedation, patients have little to no memory of the surgery at all and no pain.

Wisdom teeth are the third molars and the last set of molars that grow in the mouth. Most of the time Top McKinney Orthodontics patients do not have room for the wisdom teeth/ 3rd molars to grow into the mouth effectively. This often means that these teeth are impacted or trapped in the bone, or they try to come in and are mostly covered by gum tissue causing places for food to get trapped thus increasing the chances for infection.

In other words, healing happens faster. Younger people tend to heal quicker than older ones especially when it comes to 3rd molar wisdom tooth removal. Another reason for removing wisdom teeth earlier is that since the roots are smaller there is less risk for permanent numbness of the face or paresthesia, which can happen when long roots of wisdom teeth damage the mandibular nerve during the removal surgery.

So, if you do not have the space for 3rd molars we recommend that you get them removed earlier as opposed to later, so the recovery time will be much quicker and the risks lower. How Do I Get a FREE Initial Surgical Consultation Appointment to Remove Teeth. If you are not currently a patient at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, just call our office and ask to make a Top McKinney Orthodontics appointment for a surgical consultation. One of our doctors, Dr. Crise or Dr.

A parent or friend will need to pick up the patient since the patient will not be able to drive under the influence of sedation medications. The patient can be picked up in the back of the office and should be able to walk to the car with assistance of the surgical staff. It’s a pretty seamless procedure. We are often asked, “How long is the recovery period after 3rd molar removal. ” Of course, it varies with each patient, but usually within 2-3 days, the patient is feeling pretty good.

We recommend a liquid diet for the first 3-5 days and then adding soft foods for about one week after that. There will be a post surgery follow up appointment at our office, as well, so a doctor can look at the incisions, and make sure the healing process is going well. Post Surgical Appointment Every patient will need to be seen for a post surgical check by one of our doctors usually 5-8 days post surgery to make sure the healing is progressing well.

Roberts’ assistants, will go over any questions and/or concerns that you may have. You will then go back to the clinic for the procedure to take place. It usually takes about 45 minutes to an hour to have all four 3rd molars/ wisdom teeth removed. Time varies depending on if the wisdom teeth are impacted or are erupted. It then takes about 15 20 minutes for the sedation to wear off.

As always, if you EVER have any questions at all, please free to call our office or Dr. Roberts. If you are interested in being evaluated for wisdom teeth removal, contact our office for a FREE visit. Click here to book your free appointment. So, I looked her up and called the office to come in for our initial exam and consultation. On our appointment day, I brought both of our daughters to her office, they were ages 7 and 8 at the time. Before we left our orthodontist in Keller, I asked the orthodontist who he would recommend we go to in McKinney because I knew nothing about McKinney. He pulled up orthodontists in McKinney and surrounding cities and immediately told me to go to Dr. Stephanie Crise at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. He said she had won several awards for her orthodontic skills and had already built up a nice sized practice. He said that she also had a fun office theme.

The office was still super fun, and all of the staff was very friendly even ten years later. There were some new employees since our daughters had been patients, but both Dr. Crise and Dr. Downs were still the orthodontists there, and even some of the front desk ladies, assistants, and lab technicians were the same. I had an excellent experience with the Active clear-aligners treatment. My teeth look amazing now. I would highly recommend clear-aligners as an adult.

I said, “Okay, sounds great. ” Then about two weeks later, she called me and told me that the full-time treatment coordinator position was coming open and that she would be interested in me for the position. I said, “Yes. ” I was so excited about the opportunity to work at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. I went in for my interview and then went back for a working interview. I absolutely loved all of the staff and was so excited when they offered me the position.

If a patient came to their appointment and their teeth were clean, and none of their braces were broken, or if they wore their Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics t-shirt, then they were given Croc bucks. The patients could save these up and turn them in for prizes in the lighted showcase or for gift cards. Our girls absolutely loved collecting their Croc bucks and counting them up to turn in for prizes.

Another impressive thing about our first trip to the office was that all of the staff was so amazingly friendly when we walked in. I felt like I had been a patient there for years, and this was our first time to walk through the doors. We were all thoroughly impressed. Both of my daughters did Phase I (early orthodontic treatment) and Phase II (Full Braces treatment) at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. They each wore an expander to widen their upper jaw as well as upper partial braces.

We spent a total of 8 years at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics between both daughters doing Phase I and Phase II. As a patient parent, I always enjoyed visiting with the front desk ladies as well as the various assistants and Dr. Crise and Dr. Downs each time we visited. I remember one day thinking that I bet the employees really enjoyed their jobs because everyone was always upbeat and super friendly, and you could tell the staff all enjoyed working with each other too.

I was sad after our youngest daughter had her last appointment at Smiles Hollywood, thinking I would not be seeing these wonderful people again, but little did I know, I would decide to do Active clear-aligners on myself ten years later. I had braces in college and had worn my retainer for over 30 years after that. Then, I noticed my teeth shifting a bit, so I knew exactly where I was going to go to have Active Clear Aligner treatment done…. Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics.

I love my smile so much because I definitely have a Hollywood Smile now. About two years ago, I was looking for a job change, and I was at the grocery store and ran into the office manager at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. I remembered her from when I had active Clear Aligner treatment done, and we talked for a second, and she asked me what I was doing now. I told her I was praying about a career change. She said, “Well if we have anything come open, I will let you know”.

The office had all kinds of stand-up Hollywood actors and fun characters, as well as many different movie posters on the walls. They had a miniature theater area where there was a children’s movie playing all the time. They had a beverage area for children and adults. There was also a study area, for children who had homework to do or for adults who needed to work during their child’s appointment. The most favorite thing that our daughters liked about the office was the croc buck program.

My daughters are 15 months apart in age, so the older one started Phase I at age 8, and she was in Phase I until about age 9. 5. My younger one started Phase I at age 8 and was also in Phase I about 16-18 months. We spent several wonderful years at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. Then, it was time for my older one to start the second phase of her treatment, which was full upper and lower braces. She had her full braces put on at age 12, and she wore them until age 14.

They always loved going to their appointments each time due to the friendly staff and the exciting atmosphere in the office. They were motivated to do everything the orthodontist asked them to do because they wanted to get Croc bucks. Toward the end of Phase II for both of our daughters, they had to wear rubber bands inside their mouths. Dr. Crise was very encouraging and always explained why various treatments were being done inside their mouths.

We also love to celebrate birthdays, weddings, new babies, and anything else we can think of to celebrate. Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics is truly one big family, and we consider each of our patients as an extension of our family. If you are looking for an orthodontist for you or your family, look no further; We would be honored to have you as part of our Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics family. --- Meet Dr.

Downs herself had to have multiple phases of orthodontics multiple times, including pulling in an impacted tooth. She is very sympathetic and understands what difficult orthodontic treatments are like for a number of patients. Her ability to relate to patients on that level gives her special insight into how to connect with patients on more than just a clinical level. Because of her own orthodontic experience, she realized that creating beautiful smiles for patients would be her calling. Dr.

I feel like I’ve come full circle; from our children being treated at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics and then myself having Active Clear Aligner treatment, and now I get to work at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics and help others gain beautiful smiles too. We really are a big family at the office, and it’s such an enjoyable and rewarding job. We work really hard, but love what we do. We enjoy seeing each other every day and all of our patients too.

Downs is originally from Yorktown, Virginia. After graduating from the University of Virginia (go Wahoos. ), she completed dental school at Virginia Commonwealth University in Richmond, Virginia, where she graduated Magna Cum Laude. The prestigious orthodontic residency program at Baylor College of Dentistry (now Texas A&M Dental College) brought Dr. Downs to Dallas, Texas, where she completed her certificate of orthodontics and Master of Science. Dr.

Downs loves the orthodontic field because of the self-confidence she helps build in her patients and how she gets to build relationships over time with her patients. The bond that she builds with her patients is one that sticks for life. After 20 years in practice, her previous patients still come to visit her and even bring their children to be treated by her most capable hands. Education and Credentials Orthodontic specialist for over 20 years in McKinney TX.

Named one of “ America’s Top Dentists ”-2010 Bachelor of Arts in biology – University of Virginia (1992-1996) Doctorate of Dental Surgery, Magna Cum Laude – Medical College of Virginia at Virginia Commonwealth University, (1997-2001) Certificate of Orthodontics and Master of Science – Baylor College of Dentistry (2001-2003) Texas A&M Dental College Mentor McKinney ISD Mentor Professional Affiliations American Association of Orthodontists American Dental Association Texas Dental Association Baylor Orthodontic Alumni Association Alexander Discipline Study Group Dr.

Jessica Downs ---

Dr. Stephanie Crise has worked with Dr. Jessica Downs since 2002 and have become like sisters. Because of Dr.

Downs is still very active in the Baylor/ Texas A&M orthodontic program. She goes to many study club meetings, as well as their annual orthodontic meeting. Downs is also an advisor to many of the new orthodontic students at the Texas A&M Dental College program teaching them current treatment practices and methodologies. Dr. Downs prides herself on treating all of her patients like family and loves hearing about all of her patients’ sports and activities. In her free time, she loves taking zumba classes, going to concerts/live theater, and is a huge sports fan (particularly the Cowboys and UVA sports). Dr.

She also works closely with other dental professionals in regards to cases that involve tooth removal for overcrowding of the arch and the pulling in of teeth that are impacted in the bone. Her relationships with other dental professionals allow her to make sure the patient has the best possible treatment available to them. Dr. Downs also enjoys mentoring students and has been a career mentor through the McKinney ISD mentorship program.

Downs also enjoys traveling and going on new adventures. She is always ready to go on any type of beach trip. She loves college basketball and watching March Madness each year, especially when her UVA basketball team is playing. She loves football too and going to any sporting event with her friends or family. She is known to be a guru of pop culture and sports knowledge, so feel free to ask her any questions. She loves 1980’s music too, which is often played in our office during the day. Dr.

Downs’s incredible work ethic, drive to provide the best possible orthodontic care, and personable personality, Dr. Crise has been so grateful to have Dr. Downs her trusted associate and orthodontic partner. Dr. Downs is proficient with several bracketing systems, including Damon brackets, Innovation brackets, Alexander brackets, as well as several different functional and interceptive appliances.

These functional appliances include the Herbst appliances, rapid palatal expanders, Carriere, forsus springs, Schwartz, pendex appliance, tongue crib, as well as many holding arches, including nance, trans palatal arch, band and loops, and lower lingual arch. She is also very knowledgeable in clear-aligners and clear active aligners to give alternative treatment options to her patients, other than braces and appliances. She is one of the Best Orthodontists in Mckinney TX.

She has mentored several students, from both high school and college, who are interested in the dental profession. Many students have come and spent an entire summer with her in our office at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics to see what orthodontics is really all about. These students have been able to go over treatment plans, x-rays, and see actual chair-side treatment before going to dental school. Her last high school mentee is now in her second year of dental school. Dr.

Downs is extremely involved with her family. She spends a lot of her free time visiting her sister and their parents who both reside in New Braunfels. Her pride and joy is her adorable rescue Labrador named Bennett. Dr. Downs is an amazing dog owner. She takes her dog on a walk at least three times per day, rain, hail, sleet or snow. She enjoys staying fit and working out often and is a great dancer too. You may see her in McKinney walking her dog in the area.

Over her many years in practice, Dr. Downs has built relationships with several oral surgeons to collaborate on many surgical cases for orthognathic surgery to treat patients with Class II and Class III dental/ skeletal cases. She also works closely with periodontists, oral surgeons, and general dentists being the main point of contact for the patient when having to receive implants after braces.

” Her husband, Mike Crise, owner of a local insurance agency and a previous officer of the Rotary club, has witnessed the positive effects of his wife’s speeches first hand. Crise also employs high school students in her office through the school/work program and loves encouraging students to take dental & medical career paths. Her values shine throughout her work within the community.

Crise has spoken to local high schoolers, through the Rotary Club of Mckinney’s Academic Excellence Program, to encourage students to empower themselves and follow their dreams. Dr. Crise can be heard encouraging students to “Be BIONIC,” which stands for Believe It Or Not, I Can. “I’m always so thrilled with the positive feedback I get after these presentations. I hope to give more motivational speeches in the future here at my office in our soon-to-be constructed learning center.

Hobbies include singing, theater, dancing, watching movies with her family, going to baseball games and making others SMILE. Dr. Crise regularly gives her time to the community. Annually, she visits elementary schoolers all over McKinney and the surrounding areas to teach the importance of dental health. Dr. Crise has been interviewed as an orthodontic specialist by Channel 8 (ABC news) and has been a radio contributor with her own “Crise Byte” health news spot.

0 hover_enabled=0 global_colors_info={} sticky_enabled=0] We are fortunate to have a Top McKinney Orthodontics orthodontics team of highly trained, fun, and caring staff members. Our experienced and talented team is committed to working with you and your family to create a comfortable, stress-free, and rewarding orthodontic experience every time you visit our practice. As soon as you walk in our doors, you’ll realize you are someplace special.

We have an in-house lab and our Lab Manager has 21 years of experience with making retainers, aligners and so much more to help refine the Hollywood smile you’re here for. Before even seeing our doctors, you’ll be in the capable hands of our squad of Top McKinney Orthodontics dental technical assistant. They will become familiar faces as you move through your orthodontic journey. Our patients love the personal relationships developed with this group.

The office itself is bright and lively with so much to see, but the real gem is our staff. Our front desk team will greet you with a smile and get you checked in. After your appointment, you’ll see them again when making your appointment for the next visit. Our front desk loves to get to know you and your family, as well as to get you scheduled for the best time possible for you.

16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text admin_label=AWARDED FOR… _builder_version=4. 16 background_layout=dark global_colors_info={}] SMILES HOLLYWOOD HAS BEEN AWARDED FOR… [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=1 _builder_version=4. 0. 11 background_color=#e02b20 global_module=101 saved_tabs=all global_colors_info={}][et_pb_row _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_column type=4_4 _builder_version=4.

Our doctors participate in continuing education as well as attending several professional conferences each year to learn about exciting new Top McKinney Orthodontics techniques, products, and technology in orthodontics. It’s easy to look at our staff in their scrubs and think of them as only dental professionals, but they are all people first who have fun, loving, and interesting lives.

Downs have combined experience of over 45 years. Our doctors not only love our patients, but they love making our patient’s smiles look gorgeous through the science of orthodontics. In their 45 years, they have seen just about every scenario requiring orthodontics. Occasionally oral surgeons need to be involved and we have a network of highly trained professionals that we collaborate with if necessary.

It is a fun event that helps our valuable team to meet others who are equally as vital to their practices and develop those relationships further. Each year in the second half of the school year, it is all hands-on deck for our team as we prepare for Dr. Crise’s school visits to educate local elementary students about good hygiene for their teeth and to teach them what an orthodontist does for teeth.

In the heat of the summer, we host a Slushie truck to help our staff, patient families and passersby to keep cool. During the entirety of the year, we have contests for our patients to keep their visits lively and fun. As our name suggests, we are really into movies so movie prizes are always popular. Our fun events would not be possible without our dedicated Top McKinney Orthodontics team who work tirelessly behind the scenes, while also taking care of your teeth with skill and experience.

We love celebrations around our office so it seems there is always a staff member’s birthday to celebrate or the birth of a new baby or grandbaby. The Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics team also participates in community interaction with various events throughout our city. We are proud and honored to offer our support to a variety of local charities and assistance programs. We have a long history with The Samaritan Inn which offers hope and services for the homeless.

We are pleased to welcome you and your family, and we look forward to working with you. Let us show you why we’ve won McKinney Living and Reader’s Choice’s award for Best Orthodontists 12 times. Thank you for entrusting us with your orthodontic care. Click here to schedule your FREE Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics evaluation , or call (972) 529-9700 to speak with someone on our dynamic team. Our patients have helped us collect blankets, socks, and other warm items each year for this wonderful group. The Community Food Pantry is another beneficiary of our community-minded staff and patients. Since we work closely with so many area dentists, we want to make sure to get to know as many as we can. We hold a Chili Cookoff in the winter and invite local dentists and their staff members to participate.

One of our fundraisers happens in the Fall when we have our Halloween candy drive. Patients turn in their excess candy and Smiles Hollywood donates money for every pound of candy collected and gives the money to The Samaritan Inn to purchase a variety of basic items desperately needed by residents. Another event that is near and dear to our staff is our annual drive benefitting the youth of City church McKinney.

The Smiles Hollywood team is so integral in the prep work for these school visits and is just another example of how they are contributing to our community. We enjoy planning Top McKinney Orthodontics events and contests to ramp up the fun for our patients. Each year we host an outdoor movie night in our parking lot for our patients and families to enjoy, complete with popcorn and candy.

As a patient’s mom, I can look at situations from a different perspective to help make each family feel confident and informed about their treatment. I am a through-and-through Okie but have lived in McKinney for more than a decade and a half. My husband Jeff and I are always on the run with our three children: Connor, Josh, and Kennedy.

I love anything Disney and enjoy reading, running Disney marathons, and spending time with my boys. Charlotte Registered Dental Assistant I started in orthodontics at the age of nineteen. I came to Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics in February 2007. I love working with my coworkers. It is my pleasure to assist Dr. Crise and Dr. Downs in the technical aspect of giving our patients beautiful smiles. It is wonderful to see the changes in our patients from the beginning to the end of treatment.

Office Manager / Certified Laboratory Technologist I have been with Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics as a certified dental technologist since 2005, and the office manager since 2012. After graduating from Baylor University and the University of Texas Health Science Center for dental lab sciences, I moved to Frisco and joined the Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics team. I enjoy being a member of a cohesive orthodontic practice.

When we’re not at Kennedy’s soccer games, visiting Connor at Texas Tech, or checking in on Josh at The University of Texas at Austin, you will find Jeff and me supporting our Alma Mater, OSU … Go, Pokes. Narli Treatment Coordinator I started as a patient mom, and in 2013, I became part of the wonderful Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics family. I specialize in coordinating orthodontic insurance benefits and do my best to make the process as easy for our patients as possible.

And then there is Tiffany, our in-house lab technologist, who we are so grateful to have. Tiffany makes all of our dental appliances and retainers. I feel so fortunate about this because it brings us to an elevated level of service. We refer to our scientist as “Oz” because we feel she is magical to us and to our practice. Lastly, I am so grateful for the girls that I work with. They are such a great bunch of apples — they fell from the same tree.

I was born in Alabama but have lived in Texas most of my life. I have been married to my best friend for more than two decades. We have four children and nine grandchildren. My favorite thing to do is spend time with my family, but especially with my grandkids. Donna Registered Dental Assistant I joined the Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics team in 2006 as a chairside assistant.

Jennifer Treatment Coordinator I joined Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics in 2011, but before that, I was already a part of the Smiles family by being a patient mom for the last 13 years. As a treatment coordinator, I am able to help the doctors give a clear and concise explanation of orthodontic treatment, set up financing options, and schedule future appointments.

I learn something new every day. I handle many financial inquiries, as well as help the front desk with scheduling and answering phones. I was born and raised in California but moved to McKinney in 2006. I married my husband Phil more than a dozen years ago and have three boys: Jordan, Noah, and Aaron. Jordan loves to play football and is in JROTC, Noah loves to read, and Aaron plays baseball. We are one busy family.

As a laboratory specialist, I love seeing the impact I can have on each patient’s smile. As an office manager, I strive to make each patient and family member feel welcome, and every experience with our office a pleasant one. As an Air Force brat, I moved all over, but San Antonio is where I consider home. My husband Mark (and high school sweetheart. ) and I currently live in Frisco with our daughter and our Cocker Spaniel, Wrigley. We love to travel and spend time with our family and friends.

In the quarter century I have been a dental assistant, this has been the first office that I can say I have felt like family in the practice. I enjoy the entire process of helping Dr. Crise and Dr. Downs to create beautiful smiles. I have always believed that a beautiful smile reflects great self-confidence and helps us have a “can do” attitude toward life. I love my doctors. They are talented, honest, filled with integrity, and work cohesively to produce wonderful outcomes.

The best part of my job is seeing patients’ eyes light up when their braces come off and they see their gorgeous smiles. Having been there myself, their joy warms my heart. I was born in Costa Rica, but was raised in Texas. I married my best friend Justin in 2018. We have a fur baby Troy that we love very much. We love going to Crossfit, trying new restaurants and watching movies. Jessica C.

I have lived in Texas my whole life and am the mother of two wonderful boys, Ernesto and Christopher, who keep me very busy every day. We love watching movies every Friday night. I love anything pink and glittery. Spending time with my mom is my favorite thing to do Click here to schedule your FREE Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics evaluation or call (972)529-9700 to speak with someone on our dynamic team.

Scheduling Coordinator I started as a patient here at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics in 2018 and loved them so much that I decided to join their team. What I love best about my job at Smiles is getting to know our patients and their families. There is never a dull moment here. We have an amazing staff that keeps me laughing and I am happy to be a part of it. I am married to my high school sweetheart, Clint. We enjoy traveling and sharing fun times with family and friends. Tiffany M.

I love working out at the gym, spending time with family, especially my son, and baking holiday treats. Diana Records Assistant I am one of the newest members here at Smiles Hollywood. I did my externship here a few years back, and that is how I got to know this wonderful place. I am now working in the records area with our lab tech, Tiffany. I love being a part of my Hollywood family and getting to know the patients and see all the progress they have made.

They are my sisters at heart and I feel we make a great team. I hope you will join us and see what great service we can provide for YOU. Lali H. Registered Dental Assistant I joined Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics in May of 2019, but I have been working in the dental field since 2013. I have played a few different roles throughout the years but being an orthodontic assistant is where my heart is.

But I recently lost a front tooth and the hole stole my joy. The recommendations were unanimous… Dr. Stephanie Crise at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. I got my smile back quickly, cost-effectively, and professionally, and I appreciated the individualized care. ” — Jane M. “I chose Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics because the office is more than willing to work with my needs and concerns, whether they be financial, insurance-related, or questions about my children’s orthodontics.

The experience was awesome, I was referred by a friend and I felt welcome from the time I walked in, to the end of my three years. The customer service, from the front all the way to the back, is great. They even recommended me to a dentist who could help with my other needs. I am sad that my time has come to an end, but let’s just say they gave me my million-dollar SMILE :-). Thank you. ” — Amelia G. “My kids look forward to each appointment.

With both girls, extensive surgery was avoided by the intervention of orthodontia carried about by two excellent and gifted top Mckinney Orthodontics and the amazing staff that supports them. ” — Amy K. “Again, thank you and your staff for all your hard work, and for making it fun for your patients to go to the orthodontist. I consider myself lucky to have such a wonderful orthodontic office close to my home. ” — Christy H. “For 70 years, I’ve loved flashing my big smile.

“Everywhere I go, whether it’s to church, school, or work, i’m always hearing about the things that Dr. Crise and her staff are doing in the community. They care so much about all of our kids. I am so proud to say that we are part of her patient family. ” — Julie P. “I began my top Mckinney Orthodontics journey with Smiles Hollywood last year, and it’s been a great, easy process. I chose to use clear-aligners to correct my bite issue, which I didn’t know a lot about in the beginning.

The office environment is fun and friendly, and there are video games and movies to watch. ” — Rachel H. “We highly recommend Drs. Crise and Downs to anyone who asks us. ” — Michelle C. “The office is modern and is always neat and clean; the staff is friendly, professional, and responsive; and the top Mckinney Orthodontics doctors are always available to answer my questions. ” — Andrew G. “I just got my braces off, yayyyy.

“By far the BEST orthodontist in the state of Texas. Amaculent staff, quick and easy, and The interior is on a whole other planet. They have a playroom, gaming area, with a Xbox PS4 and Nintendo. And while your son, daughter, friend ect is getting their work done, you can sit back, eat/drink a piña colada snow cone and watch a movie in the private movie theater. I could go on forever about how amazing they are, but I probably don’t have enough space to type all of it. What are you waiting for.

It feels like we’re coming to see family instead of going to the top Mckinney Orthodontics. We love the doctors and the staff. Everyone is friendly yet professional, and they are always on time. I really appreciate it, because I’m so busy. ” —- Michelle R. “When we moved here all of my neighbors and friends told me to go to Dr. Crise. That’s why all of my boys are patients of hers. They really treat you like “Hollywood” royalty. ” — Melanie S.

As a parent of two children in braces at your office, I could not be happier with the enthusiasm my children continue to show over their braces and their appointments. ” — Tammy H. “Dr. Crise and Dr. Downs and the whole staff were gentle and caring and the office has a fun, ‘with-it’ atmosphere. I particularly like the incentive program with prizes for good brushing and patient cooperation. ” — Sheila O. “My kids love to go for their orthodontic visits.

Since I started, the ladies at SH have done an excellent job ensuring I know exactly what each aligner is intended to do, and the attention to the minor details of my teeth has been really impressive. I’m almost finished with my treatment and my teeth look great. Scheduling is always super easy, and the environment is friendly and energetic. It’s been so positive that my husband will begin treatment with SH this month. Highly recommend. ” – Andrea B.

We came for a top Mckinney Orthodontics consultation and I couldn’t believe it when Dr. Crise said that she could put him in braces at that time, but that it would be better to wait — what a trust-builder. ” — Cameron S. “Getting children to want braces isn’t tough. Keeping them motivated and happy with them for a couple of years is the real challenge.

If zero percent financing is something you are interested in then please let one of our amazing treatment coordinators know at your appointment. Payments can be easily and automatically drafted from your account/ card each month so you don’t have to worry about it. We like to make it as easy as possible for you. We also have many patients that chose to use their HSA or FSA cards, too, in order to save on taxes. The choice is absolutely up to you.

All of our brackets and braces are top of the line brands, including Damon and Innovation, that move teeth faster and with less discomfort (Both are self-ligating low friction braces). Clear Aligner treatment is a favorite of many of our adult and teen patients. This option of braces is very popular, especially for Top McKinney Orthodontics adults, because you can take them out when you are eating. No more worrying about whether or not food is stuck in your braces.

We have a variety of contests including in-office, online, and Refer-A-Friend contests with fun prizes such as gift cards, treats, and tickets to movies, concerts and sporting events. Golf Cart Shuttle pickup and return for patients who are Top McKinney Orthodontics students at Dowell Middle School next door.

Redeem your Croc Bucks for movie tickets, gift cards and other cool gifts from our prize showcase. This is a great incentive to keep our patients teeth clean and healthy. Being a great orthodontic patient will earn you rewards with Croc bucks. Save up your Croc Bucks for gift cards and/or awesome prizes. Cool Contests Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics loves hosting contests for our patients.

Slushies are so delicious during the hot summer months and they are free for the whole family. Croc Bucks Rewards Top McKinney Orthodontics Program and Prizes Patients earn Croc Bucks for great cooperation during their orthodontic treatment. Croc bucks are given for clean teeth, wearing appliances, consistently nothing broken, wearing your Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics T-shirt to your appointment and for good report cards.

Each student receives a goody bag full of educational dental info, a free toothbrush and other goodies. Dr Crise loves teaching kids and giving back to our Top McKinney Orthodontics community. Gorgeous Hollywood Smiles to last a Lifetime. Your smile is something you will have for the rest of your life. What are you waiting for. Come visit Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics so we can give you a beautiful Hollywood Smile.

Most Insurances are Accepted and we will File your Insurance for you. Exciting, family-friendly atmosphere where you’ll enjoy the red carpet treatment. Our office is super family oriented and lots of fun. We offer a cove area with children’s toys and a reading area for young readers. There is also an area for parents who need to use their laptops with WiFi internet to get some work done as well as an area for students who want to get their homework finished.

In the spring and fall, we have a golf cart that will pick up our Dowell Middle School patients for their appointments and then take them back to school afterwards. Parents must give us permission to do this and let the school know before their scheduled appointment. It is a great convenience for our patients and families. Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics Supports our Community and Schools.

In-house Movie Theater, where patients and their siblings can watch Movies, Video Game Stations, Wireless Internet, and TVs at every chair. Magical “Under the Sea” Playroom for younger siblings. Young children love playing in this area while waiting for their older brothers and sisters. Slushie machine and Hot Chocolate/Cappuccino machine as well as Purified Water for our patients. Both children and adults love the slushie machine. We change out the flavors every few months according to season.

One visit to our office will demonstrate the vibrant, friendly Top Mckinney Orthodontics atmosphere of Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. Complimentary Smiles Evaluation With your No-Obligation Smiles Hollywood Smile Top Mckinney Orthodontics Evaluation, you will receive an orthodontic exam, comprehensive consultation, treatment plan recommendation, and digital X-ray. There is no charge for this and no pressure to commit to this or any treatment plan.

Click here to schedule your FREE Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics evaluation, or call (972) 529-9700 to speak with someone on our dynamic team. 100% Lifetime Warranty At Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, we want our patients’ smiles to last forever, so every patient automatically receives our 100% Lifetime Warranty. This means you never have to worry about paying full price for braces re-treatment — ever.

0 hover_enabled=0 global_colors_info={} sticky_enabled=0] At Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, we want you to be as confident as we are in our ability to give you an awesome smile. For more than 20 years, we have been committed to staying on top of advances in orthodontic technology, to provide our Top Mckinney Orthodontics patients with not only a beautiful smile but a great all-around experience.

Free Retainer When your beautiful Hollywood smile is complete, you’ll receive both an upper and lower retainer so you will be able to keep your smile spectacular for a lifetime. But because we know that dogs love retainers and cafeteria trash cans love them too, we give every patient a free replacement retainer if the inevitable happens. Award-Winning Practice in Mckinney We are very proud of the hard work we invest in our Top Mckinney Orthodontics practice and our patients.

The foundation we build upon is our award-winning orthodontists, who are passionate about the work they do. We have surrounded ourselves with support staff who are not only highly trained in the technical aspect of orthodontics, but also deliver unmatched customer service for our patients. We have no doubt we will exceed your expectations, and we consistently provide that solid assurance to our patients.

16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text admin_label=AWARDED FOR… _builder_version=4. 16 background_layout=dark global_colors_info={}] SMILES HOLLYWOOD HAS BEEN AWARDED FOR… [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=1 _builder_version=4. 0. 11 background_color=#e02b20 global_module=101 saved_tabs=all global_colors_info={}][et_pb_row _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_column type=4_4 _builder_version=4.

Our orthodontists are members of study clubs and several professional organizations where they stay informed about new orthodontic strategies and technology, which ultimately is a huge benefit to our patients. Most Insurances Accepted Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics accepts most insurances. We can assist you in learning about orthodontic coverage your insurance plan may offer.

We Know Our Patients Because of the nature of orthodontic treatment, we get to see our patients more often, so we have the time to learn more about each person. Sometimes we know them before they’re even in treatment, because they are the younger siblings of existing patients. It is not unusual for us at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics to have a relationship with a family that lasts for years because we treat multiple family members.

Our patient and caring doctors as well as our gentle staff form special relationships with these patients and can help calm fears and anxieties about coming to the orthodontist. We Love Coming to Work. That’s not a phrase you hear very often, but it is absolutely true at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. Dr. Crise and Dr. Downs are passionate about orthodontics and that enthusiasm runs throughout our practice.

Indeed, when patients have completed treatment, we absolutely miss seeing them but know that we have done a great job of providing patients with the confidence of lifelong spectacular smiles. Special Care Orthodontics At Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, we have a long history of working with special care and special needs patients (ADHD, Autism, Asperger’s Syndrome, Cleft lip and palate, Down Syndrome, Cerebral Palsy and others).

Time and again, our reviews praise us for the warm and friendly way we interact with our patients, from the time they enter the door until the day they’ve finished treatment. Our staff understands the questions and concerns patients have on their journey to a beautiful smile, and we have the knowledge and compassion to set patients at ease about the process. “They make a point to connect with everybody individually and that makes a difference. They are truly interested in their patients’ lives.

It’s a unique environment [Dr. Stephanie Crise] put together over there and it’s all done with love. She’s in it because she loves what she does. She really loves people and it shows” P. Duarte Highly Trained Staff All members of our Top Mckinney Orthodontics team are registered dental assistants, which means they have the highest certification recognized by the state and continue to learn as new procedures and technology emerge.

Technical training is not the only noticeable quality in our dental assistants; they are also compassionate, friendly, and fun. Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics is proud of the fact that we have staff who have been with us for many years, which keeps our team cohesive … and awesome.

Even better is when it is recognized outside Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. We have been featured on local radio and TV programs, and in magazine, and continue to win Best Orthodontist awards year after year. So when we say we create award-winning smiles, we mean it. Unmatched Customer Service The Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics team is well-trained in how to do what we do, but what sets us apart is our customer service.

Trusted by Dental Professionals They say that imitation is the sincerest form of flattery, but in our Top Mckinney Orthodontics practice, the sincerest form of flattery is when other dentists, their families, and their staff seek us out for their own orthodontic needs. Over the last 20 years, Dr. Crise and Dr. Downs have treated many dentists as well as their children and spouses. We are honored that they continue to choose Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics as their orthodontic provider.

Flexible Payment Options Our top priority is helping our patients have beautiful smiles that bring them confidence as they go about their lives. Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics does not want finances to prevent that goal. We will work with you to create a payment plan that is flexible and tailored to your needs, all with 0% interest. In other words we provide 100% financing NO banks necessary.

The staff is very nice as well as the doctors.

We know that some top McKinney orthodontics patients prefer only one reminder, whereas others may want several reminders through all the variety of outlets, such as text, email, and voice messaging. You get to customize all of this to best meet your appointment reminder needs. Once you have completed Phase I or Phase II orthodontic treatment at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, you will be on a maintenance system for a while.

This is very important to you as one of our highly valued patients because when you are in need of a dental specialist in the North Dallas/McKinney/Frisco/Allen area, Dr. Crise and Dr. Downs will be more than happy to refer you to the right one. Our doctors will also write you a doctor referral letter for the specialist as well as share any photos and X-rays we have. Dr. Crise and Dr.

Verifying your insurance involves calling the insurance company, which often can take 30 minutes to an hour on hold. --- Braces Before and After ---
[et_pb_section fb_built=1 fullwidth=on _builder_version=4. 0. 11 global_module=64 saved_tabs=all global_colors_info={}][et_pb_fullwidth_post_title meta=off _builder_version=4. 16 background_image=/wp-content/uploads/mckinney-orthodontics-hero-2.

Read More Reviews [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=1_2 _builder_version=4. 16 background_image=/wp-content/uploads/mckinney-orthodontics-contact. jpeg global_colors_info={}][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=1 _builder_version=4. 0.

I kept begging my parents to let me get braces so that way I would not have to be embarrassed anymore. Then maybe the people I went to school with would stop making fun of me for my teeth. Finally, my parents told me they would let me get braces, but I would have to wait a few more years for my older sister to be done with her braces first because we could not afford both of us to have braces at the same time.

They just kept telling me, “when I have the money,” and I started to think they just wanted people to think I was an ugly girl with an ugly smile forever. That was until finally; we met with Dr. Stephanie Crise at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics. She was so charismatic and incredibly accommodating with my family and me. She helped my parents come up with a financial plan that would not hurt them and a plan that would only have me in braces for a little less than two years.

One day, I noticed the gap between my top front teeth was completely gone. I also noticed I cleaned my teeth better because I was more motivated to brush my teeth multiple times a day. I also flossed every single night because braces can cause food to get stuck between your teeth more easily. I always used mouthwash because I wanted my teeth to be as white as possible since I was starting to smile with my teeth showing more often. I was even being told I looked really pretty with braces.

Usually, you hear about all of these people’s horror stories and experiences while having Top McKinney Orthodontics braces, but I loved it. Even though after my appointments, my teeth would be sore for a little while, so I had to eat only soft foods; it was still exciting to know that the soreness meant my teeth were moving more and more toward perfection. I started noticing that my top canine teeth were aligned with the rest of my teeth instead of being at the very top of my gums.

16 global_colors_info={}] [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text admin_label=Before After 10 _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}] [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_column type=4_4 _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text admin_label=At Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics _builder_version=4. 19.

Eighteen months later, I got my braces off. It took a little bit of time to get adjusted to my new look, and at first; I thought my teeth were huge. My teeth felt very smooth, slimy, and different. I ate popcorn for the first time without being scared of messing up my teeth and brackets. And most of all, I could not stop smiling and looking at my teeth in the mirror. It was amazing; my confidence was through the roof.

5 global_colors_info={}] One of our patient’s inspiring journeys: When I was in middle school, I always got made fun of for how bad my teeth looked. I was always very self-conscious about smiling and talking, with my teeth showing too much. This led to me never smiling with my teeth showing. I tried subtly covering my mouth when eating and talking, never having my mouth open enough for my teeth to be seen.

I was telling all my friends and family, and I was posting it everywhere I could. And the best part… it was right before school pictures. Dr. Stephanie Crise was very adamant about wearing my retainer and how important it was to wear it every single night before bed. She made it clear to me that going forward, if I wanted to keep my brand new smile beautiful, then I needed to make sure always to put my retainer in before bed.

My sister had gone to a different orthodontic office, and she had braces on for over three years. Dr. Crise was very detailed on what her plan for my time in braces would look like. She kept me in the loop, which made my experience so much easier. The office was such a fun place for me to be, so I never dreaded going to my Top McKinney Orthodontics appointments because I would just play the fun arcade games, or sometimes, I would get there extra early to have enough time to sit in the movie room.

I was devastated that I had to go through all of middle school with my teeth looking terrible. Plus, I was mad at my sister because she didn’t even look bad before she got Top McKinney Orthodontics braces, and I did. In high school, my sister finally got her braces off, and I made sure to remind my parents that she no longer had braces every single chance I had.

It has been 3 years since I got my braces off, and I still wear my retainer to this day. If you just make it part of your morning and night routine, it becomes instinct to wear your Top McKinney Orthodontics retainer, and you won’t even think twice about it. At night, I brush my teeth, floss, and use mouthwash, then I put my retainer in since it is right next to my toothbrush. I take it out, clean it off and put it back into the case in the morning. Then I brush my teeth.

An upper jaw that is growing too far forward or is too narrow can be recognized at an early age and can be easily corrected in Phase One orthodontic treatment. This treatment can help to correct skeletal problems by redirecting bone growth during this rapid skeletal growing phase and often prevents the need to extract permanent teeth later. Other orthodontic problems such as severe crowding, overbite or overjet, thumb sucking or tongue thrusting habits are also addressed in Phase One treatment.

--- Two-Phase Treatment ---
[et_pb_section fb_built=1 fullwidth=on _builder_version=4. 0. 11 global_module=64 saved_tabs=all global_colors_info={}][et_pb_fullwidth_post_title meta=off _builder_version=4. 16 background_image=/wp-content/uploads/mckinney-orthodontics-hero-2.

Putting off treatment can result in a need for more invasive treatment like jaw surgery or permanent tooth removals later in the teen years during the Phase Two full braces stage. Early treatment is most effective for achieving lasting, stable results, when we are able to start on the smile earlier rather than later.

png global_colors_info={}][/et_pb_fullwidth_post_title][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=1 specialty=on _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_column type=3_4 specialty_columns=3 _builder_version=4. 16 custom_padding=||| global_colors_info={} custom_padding__hover=|||][et_pb_row_inner _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_column_inner saved_specialty_column_type=3_4 _builder_version=4.

Come in for a free Phase One orthodontic evaluation. Planning now can save your child’s smile later. Children benefit tremendously from early-phase treatment. Receiving early treatment may prevent the removal of permanent teeth later in life, or the need for aggressive surgical procedures to realign the jaws. Early Phase One orthodontic treatment will often shorten your childs Phase Two full braces treatment.

The purpose of two-phase treatment is to maximize the opportunity to accomplish the ideal healthy, functional, and aesthetic result that will remain stable throughout your child’s life and in many cases to alleviate the need for more invasive treatment options like jaw surgery or the removal of permanent teeth.

Phase One Braces (for ages 7 11 years) A Foundation for a Lifetime of Beautiful Smiles The goal of Phase One treatment is to help the jaw develop in a way that will accommodate all of the permanent teeth and improve the way the upper and lower jaws fit together. Phase One is the “skeletal” part of treatment. Children ages 7 to 11 years old often exhibit early signs of jaw problems as they grow and develop.

Not every person will need two phase treatment so it is important for your child to be evaluated by the Top Mckinney Orthodontics by age 8 or 9 years of age and at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics your orthodontic smile evaluation is free. Early Orthodontic Treatment An Important Head Start for a Great Smile. Did you know that the growth of the bones in the face slow dramatically by the age of puberty at around age 11 to age 13.

Therefore, the best time for your child to be seen by the Top Mckinney Orthodontics is between ages 7 and 8, when the bones are growing rapidly. In fact, the American Association of Orthodontists recommends that all children get a check-up with an orthodontist no later than age 7. With early orthodontic treatment, major orthodontic problems, extractions, and jaw surgery can be avoided or minimized. What if Treatment Is Put Off.

16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text admin_label=Two-Phase Treatment _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}] What Is the Advantage of Two-Phase Orthodontic Treatment in children. Two-phase orthodontic treatment is a specialized process that combines tooth straightening and skeletal facial changes.

This will be determined and accomplished in the second phase of treatment. Selective removal of certain primary (baby) teeth may be in the best interest to aid in eruption during this maintenance period. At Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, we recommend our patients be seen about every nine to twelve months for observation; just to allow the doctor to check tooth eruption and skeletal growth and to field for any other issues.

4 global_module=994 global_colors_info={}] [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=1 _builder_version=4. 0. 11 background_color=#000000 global_module=96 saved_tabs=all global_colors_info={}][et_pb_row _builder_version=4. 16 custom_padding=0px||0px||false|false global_colors_info={}][et_pb_column type=4_4 _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text admin_label=AWARD-WINNING _builder_version=4.

Maintenance Period (Time Between Phase One and Phase Two) This is the growing phase where the remaining permanent teeth are left alone as they erupt. Retaining devices may or may not be recommended. Sometimes it is best to allow the existing permanent teeth some freedom of movement. A successful Top Mckinney Orthodontics Phase One will have created room for permanent teeth to find an eruption path. At the end of the first phase of treatment, teeth are not in their final positions.

We have confidence that you or your child will sail through the braces process seamlessly and experience a spectacular result. If you would like to see the results of some finished outcomes of our patients beautiful Hollywood smiles, you can check out our before and after photos on our Braces Before and After page located under the New Patients tab on our website.

We also would love to answer any questions that you may still have regarding orthodontic treatment, so please feel free to give us a call or come by our office during our business hours. Our business hours are Monday through Thursday 7:45am to 6pm and until 6:30pm on Tuesday. We look forward to meeting you and making your Hollywood Smile dreams come true.

Phase Two begins when all permanent teeth have erupted (usually by age 12 or 13 years), and usually requires braces on all the teeth for an average of 18-24 months. Visits during your treatment are usually every 6-8 weeks. Near the end of Phase Two treatment, most patients will need to wear rubber bands in order to set their final bite. It is extremely important for each patient to wear their elastics in order to achieve their desired outcome.

After Phase Two treatment, retainers are worn to ensure your child maintains his or her beautiful smile. We know that it can be hard for patients to remember to wear their retainers, but this is extremely important to sustain their beautiful Hollywood Smile for a lifetime. Luckily as a special benefit to our Top Mckinney Orthodontics patients, we provide one “free” retainer per patient should they lose one. At Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics we pride ourselves in the amazing outcome of your smile.

Phase Two Braces (for ages 12 99) The goal of the second phase is to make sure each tooth has an exact location in the mouth where it is in harmony with the lips, cheeks, tongue, and other teeth. When this facial equilibrium is established, the teeth will function together properly. Phase Two usually involves full upper and lower braces. This is the “Dental” phase of treatment.

During your child’s initial evaluation, the orthodontist will determine if early Top Mckinney Orthodontics treatment is necessary. If so, orthodontic records will be taken to determine your childs unique treatment plan. The type of appliances to be used, the duration of treatment time, and the frequency of visits will also be discussed at your visit. Records consist of a digital scan of the teeth, digital x-rays, and photographs.

Click here to schedule your FREE Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics Top Mckinney Orthodontics evaluation, or call (972) 529-9700 to speak with someone on our dynamic team. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text admin_label=Office Visits _builder_version=4. 27. 0 hover_enabled=0 global_colors_info={} sticky_enabled=0] Our greatest goal is to give you the healthy, straight, and beautiful smile you have always wanted. We understand that choosing to receive Top Mckinney Orthodontics care is a big decision, and we are excited to help you improve the way you look and feel.

We do, however, offer a private area in our clinic that is separated from the rest of the clinic which is especially for adults who might want more privacy when being seen. We take a lot of pride in our office and want you to feel at home, when you are visiting us. We offer a cappuccino machine as well as the very sought after, slushie machine. It’s fun to see our patients come in and ask us what the newest slushie flavors are. We trade out the flavors often.

During your initial consultation, we will: Review Your Dental and Medical History Forms Perform a complete oral exam, with digital x-rays, to determine whether treatment is necessary Help you create a customized treatment plan to decide whether Braces or clear-aligners is right for you. Discuss all financial information, insurance options, and monthly payment plans During this initial consultation, our doctor will spend about 30 minutes to 45 minutes with the patient.

If you don’t have orthodontic insurance don’t fret, because at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics we provide in-house financing with NO INTEREST to make your treatment plan as affordable as possible. The treatment coordinator will go over the payment plan with you at your initial consultation. Before you leave our office, you will know your estimated orthodontic treatment plan, your treatment fee and your monthly payment plan.

We will give you a tour of the entire office on your first visit, so you feel right at home each time. We offer a cove area for little children, complete with toys and books to read, as well as children sized furniture in this area. We also have a Top Mckinney Orthodontics study space area for teens who want to do their homework in our reception room. We offer free Wi-FI as well for parents who need to work while waiting on their children.

Your initial consultation will give you the opportunity to meet our team, learn more about Top Mckinney Orthodontics, receive a complete and complementary initial exam by one of our outstanding doctors, and find out which treatment options will best meet your needs.

We do offer a paid in full discount too, if you would like to pay the entire treatment fee in one lump payment. Your treatment fee will cover all of your visits to the orthodontist, all emergency visits (should you break a bracket or a wire is poking) and your retainers. Also, watch for our specials on Facebook and Google as well as print ads. These specials can help to decrease your orthodontic fee.

The treatment coordinator will also help you in understanding your insurance benefits and how that works into your orthodontic plan. As a benefit to you, Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics will file all insurance claims for you so that you don’t have to. This is a great Top Mckinney Orthodontics benefit to you since filing insurance can be a very tedious process and can involve hours on the phone.

The doctor will look at your digital x-rays, do several measurements of the teeth and face, as well as examine your bite for proper function and fit. Then all possible treatment options will be discussed with you and we will help you decide on which treatment plan works best for you and your family. Our treatment coordinator will then go over the cost of the treatment and help formulate a payment plan that works best for you.

Our Smiles Hollywood team will be glad to answer any questions you may have, and we will provide all the information you need to determine which treatment is right for you. Please contact our office to schedule your free initial consultation. What Happens After the Initial Consultation. After your initial consultation you are one step closer to achieving the smile you’ve always wanted. On your second appointment to our office, Dr. Crise or Dr.

Our Smiles Hollywood movie theater is where we always have a kid friendly movie playing. We also offer a video gaming area, for those who enjoy video games. We have something for the whole family. Every Smile Starts With an Initial Consultation.

0 hover_enabled=0 global_colors_info={} sticky_enabled=0] FAQs [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column_inner][/et_pb_row_inner][et_pb_row_inner _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_column_inner saved_specialty_column_type=3_4 _builder_version=4. 16 global_colors_info={}][et_pb_text _builder_version=4. 27. 0 _module_preset=default header_4_font=|600||||||| header_4_text_color=#652192 header_4_font_size=20px hover_enabled=0 global_colors_info={} sticky_enabled=0] What Is Orthodontics.

An orthodontist is a specialized dentist that addresses the diagnosis, prevention, and correction of mal-positioned teeth and jaws and misaligned bite patterns. Orthodontists also may address the modification of facial growth and treat it accordingly. An orthodontist completes three additional years of training beyond their four-year dental school training to become an orthodontist. Our orthodontists at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, Dr. Stephanie Crise and Dr.

Jessica Downs, have over 45 years of combined orthodontic experience treating patients. Read More What’s the Best Age to Visit the Orthodontist. The best age to visit the orthodontist is between eight and nine years for boys and between seven and eight years for girls. However, girls are usually more dentally advanced than boys during this age. So, if your dentist recommends your child sees an orthodontist sooner, then please come visit us at Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics.

The orthodontist tightens the main archwire and uses rubber bands as well to move teeth according to the treatment plan. At Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, we offer clear braces for those patients who don’t want to look like they have braces on. However, the clear braces do have a couple of drawbacks in that sometimes they aren’t as sturdy as the metal braces and can come loose more easily than the metal braces.

Orthodontics is a specialized form of dentistry that focuses on Top McKinney Orthodontics straightening teeth and directing jaw and bone growth. At Smiles Hollywood Orthodontics, we thoughtfully focus on the diagnosis, prevention, and treatment of issues with the alignment of teeth and jaws. Braces (metal or clear) or clear-aligners for adults and children are commonly used in treatment. Read More What Is an Orthodontist.
